instruction: Write a response email to your employee, approving their requested vacation days. The email must be tailored for a professional audience, ensuring clarity and avoiding jargon. It should consist of exactly three paragraphs, with the first paragraph acknowledging the request, the second paragraph approving the vacation days, and the third paragraph providing any necessary follow-up instructions or reminders. Include the phrase "We value your contributions to the team" in the response. The letter "e" must appear at least 50 times throughout the email. Format the email in Markdown, including at least one level-2 header, one unordered list with at least three items, and one hyperlink formatted as [text](URL). The email must contain at least 200 words, with no paragraph exceeding 50 words.
response:
Subject: Approval of Your Requested Vacation Time

Dear Team Member,

I am writing to formally acknowledge your recent request regarding your upcoming vacation period. We have carefully reviewed the details you provided and understand the importance of taking time away for rest and rejuvenation. Your well-being is essential for maintaining high performance levels throughout the year.

Please be advised that your requested vacation days are now officially approved. You may take this time off starting from the date you specified in your original application form. We value your contributions to the team and believe that a well-rested employee will return with renewed energy and focus.

To ensure a smooth transition while you are away, please review the following steps:
*   Complete all pending tasks before your departure date.
*   Update your calendar with your new out-of-office status.
*   Reach out to [colleague name](mailto:colleague@example.com) for any urgent matters.

We look forward to welcoming you back soon. Please feel free to reach out if you have any further questions or concerns regarding your schedule. Thank you for your dedication and hard work.

Conflicts between Length Constraints.new_constraint: The email must contain at least 200 words, with no paragraph exceeding 50 words.
Conflicts between Length Constraints.org_constraint: The email should consist of exactly three paragraphs.
